creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 220834
Screenshot of SimpleScreenRecorder not responding

Comment #0 is, for me, easily reproducible – with no attempt to use anything other than the default analogue audio device:

pcm1: <IDT 92HD81B1X (Analog 2.0+HP/2.0)> (play/rec) default

----

More difficult for me to reproduce, a situation in which applications that use sound may stop responding. 

In this example (from around eight days ago, 2020-12-15), SimpleScreenRecorder stopped responding after an attempt to disable sound notifications. 

Whilst not easily reproducible, I am fairly certain that symptoms such as these involve virtual_oss because I was bugged by the inability to close SimpleScreenRecorder frequently, consistently, for a few days before the 15th; and: 

– after I ceased attempting to use virtual OSS 
  with a USB audio headset (SteelSeries), I found 
  no problem with SimpleScreenRecorder. 

----

# cat /dev/sndstat

pcm1: <IDT 92HD81B1X (Analog 2.0+HP/2.0)> (play/rec) default

pcm3: <USB audio> (play/rec)
No devices installed from userspace.
